name: Milk Chocolate Pound Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 Milk chocolate candy bar; melted (1-1/8 oz each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Mix in melted chocolate candy bars and buttermilk.
4. Combine flour, salt, and baking soda; stir into the chocolate mixture.
5. Fold in chopped pecans, chocolate syrup, and vanilla.
6. Pour batter into a greased and floured 10-inch tube or Bundt pan.
7. Bake at 325 degrees for 1 hour and 15 minutes or until done.
8. Let cool, then sift powdered sugar over the cake if desired.
